primary_missions.name: Determined Acquisition
primary_missions.lore: The resistance arrayed against you is formidable indeed, yet your orders are clear; take and hold the ground ahead, heedless of the cost.

scoring.criteria: For each **objective** you control that you did not control at the start of the turn (excluding your **home objective**).

objectives.name: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
objectives.when: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round).

scoring.criteria: For each **objective** you control.
For each of those **objectives** that is within your opponent’s territory.

primary_missions.name: Purification
primary_missions.lore: The ground here is corrupted It must be cleansed and sanctified of its daemonic taint. Kill all exposed to its malignance and perform the rituals of purification.

scoring.criteria: For each objective you control.
For each objective that was sanctified by your army.

primary_missions.name: Prepare the Way
primary_missions.lore: The Hive Mind’s imperatives are clear: overcome the enemy. Drive them from their holdfasts and bury them with weight of numbers. Prepare this world for consumption.

scoring.criteria: A friendly unit (excluding battle-shocked units) is within your opponent's deployment zone.

objectives.name: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
objectives.when: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round).

scoring.criteria: You control two or more objectives (excluding your home objective).
You control one or more objectives (excluding your home objective).

primary_missions.name: Outmanoeuvre
primary_missions.lore: Speed and positioning are key in any battle. Outflank the enemy, seize high ground and routes of resupply. Choke them to death.

scoring.criteria: You control your opponent’s **home objective**.
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).

primary_missions.name: Search and Scour
primary_missions.lore: Forward elements report enemy movement in this sector. Move out, locate the foes and halt their operation before it gathers momentum.

scoring.criteria: You control one or more **central objectives**.
One or more enemy units that started the turn within a **terrain area** are **destroyed**.

objectives.when: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round).

primary_missions.name: Triangulation
primary_missions.lore: By acquiring and transmitting precise coordinates, your forces will be able to summon reinforcements, saturate the battlefield with artillery fire or call in other means of support.

objectives.name: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
objectives.when: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round).

One **objective** is **triangulated**.
Two **objectives** are **triangulated.**
Three or more **objectives** are **triangulated**.

primary_missions.name: Cult Ritual
primary_missions.lore: Beneath this battlefield lies a nexus of warp energy. Sweep the enemy aside, drive them from places of power and conduct your rituals. Then shall reality be torn asunder and the blessings of Tzeentch fall upon you.

objectives.name: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
objectives.when: (Once per turn, per army) A friendly model within range of an objective that you have not bound manifests a Ritual with a Warp Charge value of 7 or more.

scoring.criteria: You do not resolve that Ritual's effects and that objective is bound by you.
For each objective you control.

primary_missions.name: For the Kindred
primary_missions.lore: The enemy trespasses upon claimed ground. Strike forth and defend your claim. Let none be ignorant of the fact that this ground belongs to the kindred.

scoring.criteria: If a friendly unit (excluding battle-shocked units) is within your opponent's territory.

objectives.name: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
objectives.when: End of your Command phase (or the end of your turn in the fifth battle round).

scoring.criteria: For each expansion objective you control.

primary_missions.name: Complete Annihilation
primary_missions.lore: These foes delay us from our holy duties. Destroy them. Let nothing remain of their corpses but glowing ash. Then we shall take what is ours.
primary_missions.description: START OF THE BATTLE: Select one enemy unit and your opponent selects one other enemy unit.

scoring.criteria: You control one or more objectives.
You control two or more objectives.
For each of the selected enemy units that is destroyed.

primary_missions.name: For Cadia!
primary_missions.lore: The Emperor demands, soldiers! Advance, wrest your objectives from the foe and remind these curs that Cadia fights on!

scoring.criteria: You control two or more objectives.
You control one or more objectives.
There are no enemy units (excluding battle-shocked units) within your territory.

primary_missions.name: Immovable Object
primary_missions.lore: Obstinance is often the key to victory. Weather everything the enemy throws at you. If your opponent is to take any ground, they will have to wade through their own dead to do so.

scoring.criteria: You control one or more **central objectives**.
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).
For each **objective** you control (excluding your **home objective**).

primary_missions.name: Reconnaissance Sweep
primary_missions.lore: Enemy movements have aroused suspicion. Disperse your forces, probe their lines and decipher their intentions.

primary_missions.name: Punishment
primary_missions.lore: Those who resist must be punished. Make a bloody example of them, and leave none in doubt as to your mastery.
primary_missions.description: **START OF YOUR TURN:** Select one to three enemy units that are on the battlefield and within range of **objectives** and/or that **destroyed** one or more friendly units in the previous turn. If you cannot, select one enemy unit that is on the battlefield. Until the start of your next turn, those units are **condemned**.

scoring.criteria: One or more **condemned** enemy units left the battlefield this turn.

primary_missions.name: Architects of Agony
primary_missions.lore: Inflict unspeakable agonies upon the enemy and let their pain empower you to victory.

scoring.criteria: You control your opponent's home objective.

primary_missions.name: Defenders of the Golden Throne
primary_missions.lore: Those who seek to despoil the Emperor's realm must be brought to justice and their plots shattered. Seize ground, dominate the battlefield and leave the foe in no doubt as to your superiority.

objectives.name: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS

primary_missions.lore: A vital asset has been lost amidst the chaos of battle. You must secure the item at all costs.

primary_missions.name: Grandiose Slaughter
primary_missions.lore: What more rewarding place for the sensorium than the field of war? Test yourself against the foe: spill their blood, bathe in their gore, and drink in their anguished screams.

primary_missions.name: Inexorable Conquest
primary_missions.lore: None shall halt the march of the Death Guard. March upon the enemy, bestow upon them Grandfather Nurgle's festering gifts and drive them from this place.

primary_missions.name: Dynastic Reclamation
primary_missions.lore: Lesser beings trespass upon your dynasty's territory. Send your legions against them and show them the error of their ways.

primary_missions.name: On Holy Ground
primary_missions.lore: The unbelievers dare to walk on this sacred ground? Stride forth and meet them. Seize and hold ground. Demonstrate unto them the folly of opposing the God-Emperor.

primary_missions.name: Unstoppable Force
primary_missions.lore: The enemy are arrayed before you in number, and well prepared for the coming assault. Smash through their defences. Grind them to dust.

primary_missions.name: Indescriminate Butchery
primary_missions.lore: Blood for the Blood God! Skulls for the Skull Throne! Butcher them all and raise totems in Khorne’s honour.

primary_missions.name: Destroyer's Wrath
primary_missions.lore: Victory here shall not be measured in ground taken or plunder seized, but in the mangled corpses of your foes and the grisly trophies hewn from their bodies.

scoring.criteria: One or more enemy units were **destroyed** this turn.

primary_missions.name: Shatter the Veil
primary_missions.lore: Conquer the battlefield. Slaughter your foes and spill oceans of blood, and, in doing so, earn the patronage of the Dark Gods.

primary_missions.name: Smoke and Mirrors
primary_missions.lore: Cunning is as potent a weapon as overwhelming force. Outnumbered or outgunned, you must make use of subterfuge and misdirection to pick the enemy apart.

primary_missions.name: Inquisitorial Sanction

primary_missions.name: Locate and Deny
primary_missions.lore: The enemy is searching for an asset of value. By cunning or by force of arms, prevent its retrieval.
primary_missions.description: **START OF THE BATTLE:** Select five **terrain areas** not within your deployment zone; for each one, place one of your **operation markers** within it. If you cannot, do so for each **terrain area** that is not within your deployment zone.

primary_missions.name: Consecrate
primary_missions.lore: Whether in the name of grand ideals or simply to satisfy the thirst of their terrible gods, your warriors must consecrate this battlefield with the blood of their foes.
primary_missions.description: Each time a friendly unit **destroys** a unit, that friendly unit becomes a **consecration** unit. At the end of your turn, for each of your **consecration** units, you can select one **objective** it is within range of (excluding your **home objective**) that has not been **consecrated**. If you do, place one of your operation markers within range of that **objective** – that **objective** is **consecrated** and that unit is no longer a **consecration** unit.

scoring.criteria: One or two **objectives** are **consecrated**.
Three or more **objectives** are **consecrated**.

primary_missions.name: Vital Link
primary_missions.lore: A key communications node is located in the midst of this battlefield. Control of this node is crucial to the continued success of your armies. Ensure it does not fall into enemy hands.

primary_missions.name: Strike from on High

primary_missions.lore: Seize your objectives and let no opponent drive you from them. Win a glorious victory this day and, by doing so, uphold the Chapter's honour.

primary_missions.name: Outflank and Encircle

primary_missions.name: Encircle and Destroy
primary_missions.lore: Warriors of Fenris! The foe taunts us with their presence. We shall give them the battle they desire, but on our terms. Surround them, cut off their routes of retreat and then, when their fate is sealed, rip their beating hearts from their chests.

primary_missions.lore: Information is power. Evaluate the strengths and weaknesses of the enemy and feed this crucial information back to your superiors.
primary_missions.description: Each time a friendly unit ends a move within range of one **objective** that has any of your **opponent’s operation** markers within range of it, remove those **operation markers** from the battlefield.

secondary_missions.name: Bring It Down
secondary_missions.lore: Prioritise the destruction of heavily armoured assets. Bring them down at all costs.
secondary_missions.description: WHEN DRAWN: If there are no enemy models with a **W** of 10 or more on the battlefield, you can discard this card and draw one new **Secondary Mission** card.

scoring.criteria: For each enemy model with a **W** of 10 or more **destroyed** this turn.
For each enemy model with a **W** of 10 or more **destroyed** this turn.

secondary_missions.name: Outflank
secondary_missions.lore: Exploit the flanks; use your speed and momentum to surround the foe and catch them in the jaws of a trap.
secondary_missions.description: **Designer’s Note:** Opposite battlefield edges are those parallel to each other.

scoring.criteria: One or more friendly units (excluding **AIRCRAFT** and **battle‑shocked** units) are within 6" of one or more battlefield edges and not within your territory.
Two or more friendly units (excluding **AIRCRAFT** and **battle‑shocked** units) are within 6" of opposite battlefield edges and one or more of those units is not within your territory.

secondary_missions.name: Engage On All Fronts
secondary_missions.lore: Probe their lines and engage any resistance. Stretch the foe to breaking point.
secondary_missions.description: If one or more friendly units (excluding **AIRCRAFT** and **battle‑shocked** units) are wholly within a table quarter, and those units are not within 6" of the centre of the battlefield, you have a **presence** in that table quarter.

scoring.criteria: You have a **presence** in three table quarters.
You have a **presence** in three table quarters.
You have a **presence** in four table quarters.
You have a **presence** in four table quarters.

secondary_missions.name: Plunder
secondary_missions.lore: Unguarded prizes lie strewn across the field of battle. Secure them and deny them to the enemy.
secondary_missions.description: **WHEN DRAWN:** If the Cleanse **Secondary Mission** is active for you, you can draw one new **Secondary Mission** card and shuffle this card back into your **Secondary Mission** deck.

scoring.criteria: A **terrain area** was **plundered** this turn.

secondary_missions.name: Beacon
secondary_missions.lore: Bold and defiant, your chosen champions taunt the foe, drawing them on. Should they hold fast in the face of the inevitable response, the enemy’s momentum will surely falter.
secondary_missions.description: **WHEN DRAWN:** Select one friendly unit on the battlefield or embarked within a **TRANSPORT** on the battlefield to be your **beacon** unit.

objectives.name: ANY BATTLE ROUND
objectives.when: End of your opponent’s turn or the end of the fifth battle round (whichever comes first).

scoring.criteria: Your **beacon** unit is on the battlefield and not within your deployment zone.
Your **beacon** unit is on the battlefield and not within your territory.

secondary_missions.name: Forward Position
secondary_missions.lore: You must break the enemy line and establish a forward position to launch fresh assaults.
secondary_missions.description: **WHEN DRAWN:** If it is the first battle round, you can draw one new **Secondary Mission** card and shuffle this card back into your **Secondary** **Mission** deck.

scoring.criteria: You control your opponent’s **home objective** and/or each **expansion objective**.

secondary_missions.name: Assassination
secondary_missions.lore: The enemy looks to their champions for courage. Identify and eliminate them with extreme prejudice.

scoring.criteria: For each enemy **CHARACTER** model destroyed this turn.
For each of those models with a **W** of 4 or more.
One or more enemy **CHARACTER** models were destroyed this turn, or all enemy **CHARACTER** models have been destroyed during the battle.

secondary_missions.name: Display of Might
secondary_missions.lore: Intimidation is a potent weapon. Demonstrate your battlefield supremacy with a brutal show of force and erode what remains of the enemy’s morale.

scoring.criteria: There are more friendly units than enemy units (excluding **AIRCRAFT** and **battle‑shocked** units) wholly within No Man’s Land.
There are more friendly units than enemy units (excluding **AIRCRAFT** and **battle‑shocked** units) wholly within No Man’s Land.

secondary_missions.name: Burden Of Trust
secondary_missions.lore: The strategic prizes in this region must be guarded at all costs – a duty that falls upon a chosen few.
secondary_missions.description: **WHEN DRAWN/START OF YOUR TURN:** For each **objective**, you can select one friendly unit on the battlefield to **guard** that **objective**. Until the start of your next turn, while that unit is within range of that **objective** and while you control that **objective**, that **objective** is **guarded** by your army.

objectives.name: ANY BATTLE ROUND
objectives.when: End of your opponent’s turn or the end of the fifth battle round (whichever comes first).

scoring.criteria: For each **objective guarded** by your army.

secondary_missions.name: Centre Ground
secondary_missions.lore: The heart of the battlefield is key to victory. Dominate the centre ground, and you shall be one step closer to achieving your goals.

scoring.criteria: One or more friendly units (excluding **AIRCRAFT** and **battle‑shocked** units) are within 3" of the centre of the battlefield, and no enemy units are within 3" of the centre of the battlefield.
One or more friendly units (excluding **AIRCRAFT** and **battle‑shocked** units) are within 3" of the centre of the battlefield, and no enemy units are within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.

secondary_missions.name: Secure No Man's Land
secondary_missions.lore: You must advance swiftly into no man’s land and seize it before the enemy can, lest they take control of the battlefield.

scoring.criteria: You control two or more **objectives** within No Man’s Land (excluding your **home objective**).

secondary_missions.name: Cleanse
secondary_missions.lore: Your forces have identified a series of tainted objectives in this area. Purify these locations.
secondary_missions.description: **WHEN DRAWN:** If the Plunder **Secondary Mission** is active for you, you can draw one new **Secondary Mission** card and shuffle this card back into your **Secondary Mission** deck.

scoring.criteria: One **objective** was **cleansed** by your army this turn.
Two or more **objectives** were **cleansed** by your army this turn.

secondary_missions.name: A Grievous Blow
secondary_missions.lore: Target and eliminate the most numerous and potent of enemy infantry to shatter their battle line.
secondary_missions.description: **WHEN DRAWN:** If there are no enemy units with a **starting strength** of 13+ on the battlefield, you can discard this card and draw one new **Secondary Mission** card.

scoring.criteria: For each enemy unit with a **starting strength** of 13+ **destroyed** this turn.
For each enemy unit with a **starting strength** of 13+ **destroyed** this turn.

secondary_missions.name: No Prisoners
secondary_missions.lore: Show no mercy. Exterminate your enemies.

scoring.criteria: For each enemy unit **destroyed** this turn.

secondary_missions.name: Overwhelming Force
secondary_missions.lore: The enemy holds your assigned objectives. Commit your forces in full and sweep them from these locations post‑haste.

scoring.criteria: For each enemy unit that started the turn within range of one or more **objectives** and is **destroyed**.

secondary_missions.name: A Tempting Target
secondary_missions.lore: An opportunity to seize a valuable asset has been identified, but the enemy are likely to use it as bait in a trap. Move to secure the site, but be wary of enemy ambushes.
secondary_missions.description: **WHEN DRAWN:** Your opponent selects one **objective** (excluding **home objectives**) within No Man’s Land to be your **tempting target**.

scoring.criteria: You control your **tempting target**.

secondary_missions.name: Behind Enemy Lines
secondary_missions.lore: Your orders are clear: break through the enemy and cut off their escape routes.
secondary_missions.description: **WHEN DRAWN:** If it is the first battle round, you can draw one new **Secondary Mission** card and shuffle this card back into your **Secondary** **Mission** deck.

scoring.criteria: For each friendly unit (excluding **AIRCRAFT** and **battle‑shocked** units) wholly within your opponent’s deployment zone.

secondary_missions.name: Defend Stronghold
secondary_missions.lore: You are charged with the defence of a critical objective. It must not be permitted to fall into enemy hands.
secondary_missions.description: **WHEN DRAWN:** If it is the first battle round, draw one new **Secondary Mission** card and shuffle this card back into your **Secondary Mission** deck.

objectives.name: SECOND BATTLE ROUND ONWARDS
objectives.when: End of your opponent’s turn or the end of the fifth battle round (whichever comes first).

scoring.criteria: You control your **home objective**.
No enemy units are within your deployment zone.

twists.name: Mirrored World
twists.lore: As destinies converge, rival warlords find themselves on parallel paths, competing with one another to achieve near‑identical outcomes and objectives.
twists.rules:
The players both replace their **Primary Mission** card with the same one of the following **Primary Mission** cards. If both players agree on one of them, use that **Primary Mission** card; otherwise, roll a D6 and consult the table below.

**PRIMARY MISSION**
Mission - D6
Battlefield Dominance - 1
Meatgrinder - 2
Outmanoeuvre - 3
Gather Intel - 4
Sabotage - 5
(Roll again) - 6

**Designer’s Note:** *This is a great twist for players who want to play a simpler battle of Warhammer 40,000, as both players will be trying to achieve the same* **Primary Mission**.

twists.name: Ruinscape
twists.lore: Decades of war have reduced the structures on this battlefield to hollow ruins. Your warriors stalk and scramble through the skeletal remnants of half‑destroyed buildings as they close in upon their enemies.
twists.rules:
When a unit makes a **normal** or **advance move**, models in that unit have the **MOBILE** keyword until that move ends.

**Designer’s Note:** *For players who want to play with a lot of terrain and/or with many large models, this twist can help keep the battle flowing.*

twists.name: Scrambled Communications
twists.lore: Scrambled communications and intertwined vox‑channels have disrupted the chain of command, leaving your orders and objectives unclear.
twists.rules:
The players exchange their **Primary Mission** cards.

**Designer’s Note:** *This is a great twist to shake things up in a regular match-up, or for players who love to embrace chaos!*

twists.name: Night Fighting
twists.lore: A shroud of darkness has fallen across the battlefield, obscuring the vision of your warriors and providing them with cover beneath which to advance.
twists.rules:
Each unit is not **visible** to enemy models unless they are within 18" of that unit, and each unit cannot be targeted by **[INDIRECT FIRE]** weapons unless the attacking model is within 18" of that unit.

**Designer’s Note:** *This is a great twist for players who do not yet have a battlefield’s worth of terrain.*

twists.name: Martial Pride
twists.lore: The rank and file of your armies are determined to demonstrate their value, advancing relentlessly toward their assigned objectives whilst maintaining a punishing rate of fire.
twists.rules:
A **BATTLELINE** unit can **start an action** in a turn in which it made an **advance move**.
A **BATTLELINE** unit can **shoot in a turn** in which it **started an action**.

**Designer’s Note:** *This is a great twist for Incursion battles.*

twists.name: Nowhere to Hide
twists.lore: This battlefield only affords the illusion of cover – nowhere is safe.
twists.rules:
**Terrain features** do not have the **Solid** rule.

**Designer’s Note:** *This twist lets models draw **line of sight** through any gap in a **terrain feature**, allowing more ‘true line of sight’ and more lethal shooting.*
